## Description

<!-- Summary of the change. Link Issues or Discussions when relevant. -->

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation (`docs/` or root markdown)
- [ ] Release notes (`CHANGELOG.md`)
- [ ] Community templates (`.github/`)
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] Links and paths are correct (including Jekyll `permalink` paths under `docs/`)
- [ ] If editing `docs/`, previewed with `bundle exec jekyll serve` in `docs/` (or CI will build on merge)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or customer data in the diff
- [ ] Tone matches existing user documentation
